footer.tagline: Pdfing Pro is a secure, browser-based PDF utility suite. Most tools run locally inside your browser, so your files never leave your device.
legal.privacy.title: Privacy Policy
legal.privacy.subtitle: How Pdfing Pro collects, uses, and protects information when you use our browser-based PDF tools.
legal.privacy.sections.overview.title: 1. Introduction
legal.privacy.sections.overview.p1: Pdfing Pro ("Pdfing Pro", "we", "us", or "our") is a free online PDF utility suite operated by Inievo Technologies. This Privacy Policy describes how we handle information when you visit pdfing.pro, use our tools, or install Pdfing Pro as a progressive web app (PWA).
legal.privacy.sections.overview.p2: Our product is designed so that most PDF operations run in your web browser on your own device. We do not require an account, and we do not sell your documents or personal data. By using Pdfing Pro, you acknowledge that you have read and understood this Privacy Policy.
Each tool in Pdfing Pro is labeled to show how your data is handled. Understanding these labels helps you choose the right workflow for sensitive documents:
Local — Your files are processed entirely in your browser. Document content is not uploaded to our servers for these tools.
Server — Specific inputs (such as a website URL) are sent to our server so we can complete the conversion you requested. The generated file is returned to your browser.
Limited — The tool runs in your browser, but output quality or validation may be constrained by browser capabilities, file format, or industry-standard requirements.
legal.privacy.sections.clientSide.title: 3. Local (browser-based) processing
legal.privacy.sections.clientSide.p1: The majority of Pdfing Pro tools — including merge, split, compress, rotate, watermark, sign, redact, OCR, and most conversion tools — process your files locally using JavaScript libraries such as PDF.js, pdf-lib, and Tesseract.js. When you use these tools:
legal.privacy.sections.clientSide.l1: Your PDFs, images, and other files remain on your device unless you choose to download or share the result yourself.
legal.privacy.sections.clientSide.l2: We do not receive, access, store, or review the content of your documents.
legal.privacy.sections.clientSide.l3: Processing occurs in your browser's memory and is cleared when you close the tab, refresh the page, or clear your browser data.
legal.privacy.sections.websiteToPdf.p1: When you use the Website to PDF tool and submit a public URL for server rendering, the URL and your selected print settings are sent to our server. We use a headless browser to render the page and return a PDF to your device.
legal.privacy.sections.websiteToPdf.p2: We do not intentionally retain submitted URLs or generated PDFs after your request is fulfilled. Responses are delivered with no-store caching headers. Other options within the same tool — such as uploading HTML or using your browser's print dialog — remain fully local.
legal.privacy.sections.limitedTools.p1: Some tools are marked Limited because they cannot guarantee full compliance or validation in every environment:
legal.privacy.sections.limitedTools.l1: PDF to PDF/A — produces PDF/A-oriented output in the browser but does not perform a full archival compliance audit (fonts, color profiles, metadata, and long-term preservation requirements).
legal.privacy.sections.limitedTools.l2: Verify PDF Signature — checks signature presence and basic validation in the browser but is not a substitute for a qualified trust service or legal certification.
Pdfing Pro may store small preference values in your browser's local storage to improve your experience. This information never leaves your device unless you clear it:
PWA cache data — if you install Pdfing Pro, application assets (not your documents) may be cached locally for faster loading and limited offline access.
legal.privacy.sections.dataWeCollect.p1: We aim to collect as little information as possible. Depending on how you use Pdfing Pro, the following technical data may be processed:
legal.privacy.sections.dataWeCollect.l1: Server request metadata — when you use server-assisted features, standard web server logs (such as IP address, timestamp, request path, and error codes) may be recorded by our hosting infrastructure for security, abuse prevention, and reliability.
legal.privacy.sections.dataWeCollect.l2: Communications you send us — if you email contact@inievo.com, we receive the information you voluntarily include in your message.
legal.privacy.sections.dataWeCollect.l3: Cookies — Pdfing Pro does not use advertising or third-party tracking cookies. Essential session and preference data is handled through browser storage as described above.
legal.privacy.sections.dataWeDontCollect: Except as expressly described in this policy, we do not collect or store:
The contents of PDFs, images, or other files processed with local tools.
User accounts, passwords, or payment details — the service is free and does not require sign-up.
Advertising profiles, cross-site tracking identifiers, or document-activity analytics.
Biometric data, contact lists, precise location, or device contacts.
Permanent archives of URLs or PDFs from Website to PDF conversions.
legal.privacy.sections.thirdParty.title: 9. Third-party services
legal.privacy.sections.thirdParty.p1: We use a limited number of third-party services to operate Pdfing Pro:
legal.privacy.sections.thirdParty.l1: Cloudinary — brand logos and marketing images may be delivered from Cloudinary's content delivery network. Your browser may contact Cloudinary's servers when those assets load.
legal.privacy.sections.thirdParty.l2: Hosting and infrastructure providers — our application is deployed on managed cloud infrastructure that may process technical request metadata as part of normal operation.
legal.privacy.sections.thirdParty.p3: Open-source libraries — Pdfing Pro incorporates widely used open-source components (such as PDF.js and pdf-lib) that run locally in your browser. These libraries do not transmit your files to their authors.
legal.privacy.sections.security.title: 10. Security
legal.privacy.sections.security.p1: We apply reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect the Service, including HTTPS transport, access controls on server infrastructure, and minimal data collection by design.
legal.privacy.sections.security.p2: No method of transmission or storage is completely secure. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your own device, browser, and network environment when handling sensitive documents.
legal.privacy.sections.yourRights.title: 11. Your choices and rights
legal.privacy.sections.yourRights.p1: Because most processing happens locally, you maintain direct control over your files. You may clear browser storage at any time to remove saved preferences.
legal.privacy.sections.yourRights.p2: If you have questions about information we hold about you, or wish to exercise applicable privacy rights, contact us at contact@inievo.com. We will respond within a reasonable timeframe.
legal.privacy.sections.retention.title: 12. Data retention
legal.privacy.sections.retention.p1: Document content processed locally is not retained on our servers. Preference data remains on your device until you clear it.
legal.privacy.sections.retention.p2: Server logs and support correspondence are retained only as long as necessary for security, troubleshooting, and legal compliance, then deleted or anonymized according to our operational policies.
legal.privacy.sections.children.title: 13. Children's privacy
legal.privacy.sections.children.p1: Pdfing Pro is not directed to children under 13 years of age, and we do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe a child has provided us with personal information, please contact us at contact@inievo.com and we will take appropriate steps to delete it.
legal.privacy.sections.changes.title: 14. Changes to this policy
legal.privacy.sections.changes.p1: We may update this Privacy Policy to reflect changes in our practices, tools, or legal requirements. When we do, we will revise the "Last updated" date above. Material changes may also be noted on the website. Continued use of Pdfing Pro after an update constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.
legal.privacy.sections.contact.title: 15. Contact us
legal.privacy.sections.contact.p1: Inievo Technologies is the data controller for Pdfing Pro. For privacy questions, requests, or concerns, visit our Contact page or email contact@inievo.com.
legal.terms.title: Terms of Service
legal.terms.subtitle: The agreement between you and Inievo Technologies governing your use of Pdfing Pro.
legal.terms.sections.acceptance.title: 1. Agreement to terms
legal.terms.sections.acceptance.p1: These Terms of Service ("Terms") constitute a legally binding agreement between you and Inievo Technologies ("Inievo", "we", "us", or "our") governing your access to and use of Pdfing Pro, including the website, web application, progressive web app, and any related tools (collectively, the "Service").
legal.terms.sections.acceptance.p2: By accessing or using the Service, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to these Terms and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, you must not use the Service.
legal.terms.sections.eligibility.title: 2. Eligibility
legal.terms.sections.eligibility.p1: You must be at least 13 years old to use Pdfing Pro. If you are under the age of majority in your jurisdiction, you may use the Service only with the consent and supervision of a parent or legal guardian.
legal.terms.sections.eligibility.p2: You represent that you have the legal capacity to enter into this agreement and that your use of the Service will comply with all applicable local, national, and international laws.
legal.terms.sections.service.title: 3. Description of the service
legal.terms.sections.service.p1: Pdfing Pro provides free, browser-based tools for working with PDF documents and related file formats. Capabilities include, without limitation:
legal.terms.sections.service.l1: Organizing PDFs — merge, split, reorder, rotate, extract, duplicate, reverse, compare, booklet layout, N-Up, and workflow automation.
legal.terms.sections.service.l2: Editing and enhancing — compress, watermark, stamp, sign, crop, redact, highlight, add images, page numbers, padding, metadata, forms, OCR, and annotation management.
legal.terms.sections.service.l3: Converting — PDF to and from images, Word, Excel, text; website and HTML to PDF; grayscale, invert, resize, flatten, and repair utilities.
legal.terms.sections.service.l4: Security — protect, unlock, sanitize, and verify signatures, subject to the limitations described in these Terms.
legal.terms.sections.service.p2: The Service is provided free of charge. Features, tool availability, and processing methods may change as we improve the product.
legal.terms.sections.processingModels.p1: Tools are labeled to indicate how your data is handled:
legal.terms.sections.processingModels.l1: Local tools process files entirely in your browser. We do not receive your document content.
legal.terms.sections.processingModels.l2: Server-assisted tools (currently Website to PDF URL rendering) send specific inputs to our servers to complete your request.
legal.terms.sections.processingModels.l3: Limited tools operate locally but may not achieve full standards compliance or professional-grade validation in every case.
legal.terms.sections.accounts.title: 5. Accounts and access
legal.terms.sections.accounts.p1: Pdfing Pro does not require user registration. You are responsible for securing your own device, browser, and network. We may implement rate limits, captchas, or other safeguards to protect the Service from abuse.
legal.terms.sections.acceptableUse.title: 6. Acceptable use
legal.terms.sections.acceptableUse.p1: You agree to use the Service only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms. You must not:
legal.terms.sections.acceptableUse.l1: Process, upload, convert, or distribute content you do not have the legal right to use.
legal.terms.sections.acceptableUse.l2: Infringe intellectual property, privacy, or other rights of any person or entity.
legal.terms.sections.acceptableUse.l3: Attempt to bypass security measures, probe or scan our systems, or interfere with the proper functioning of the Service.
legal.terms.sections.acceptableUse.l4: Use automated scripts or bots to abuse server-assisted features or impose unreasonable load on our infrastructure.
legal.terms.sections.acceptableUse.l5: Remove encryption or passwords from PDFs you are not authorized to access.
legal.terms.sections.acceptableUse.l6: Use the Service to create, distribute, or conceal malware, illegal content, or fraudulent materials.
legal.terms.sections.yourContent.title: 7. Your content
legal.terms.sections.yourContent.p1: You retain all ownership rights in the documents, files, URLs, and other content you submit to or process through the Service ("Your Content"). We do not claim ownership of Your Content.
legal.terms.sections.yourContent.p2: You grant us a limited, non-exclusive license to process Your Content solely to the extent necessary to provide the Service — for example, rendering a URL you submit into a PDF. This license ends when the requested operation is complete.
legal.terms.sections.yourContent.p3: You are solely responsible for the accuracy, legality, and appropriateness of Your Content and for reviewing all output before use in business, legal, medical, financial, or other professional contexts.
legal.terms.sections.disclaimer.title: 8. Disclaimer of warranties
legal.terms.sections.disclaimer.p1: THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED ON AN "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" BASIS WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, WHETHER EXPRESS, IMPLIED, OR STATUTORY, INCLUDING WITHOUT LIMITATION WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, TITLE, AND NON-INFRINGEMENT.
legal.terms.sections.disclaimer.p2: Pdfing Pro is currently offered as a beta product. We do not warrant that the Service will be uninterrupted, error-free, secure, or compatible with every PDF, browser, operating system, or device configuration.
legal.terms.sections.disclaimer.p3: Without limiting the foregoing, we do not guarantee OCR accuracy, conversion fidelity, digital signature validity, PDF/A archival compliance, or preservation of complex formatting, fonts, annotations, or form fields.
legal.terms.sections.liability.title: 9. Limitation of liability
legal.terms.sections.liability.p1: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW, INIEVO TECHNOLOGIES AND ITS OFFICERS, DIRECTORS, EMPLOYEES, AND AFFILIATES SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, EXEMPLARY, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, OR ANY LOSS OF PROFITS, DATA, GOODWILL, OR BUSINESS OPPORTUNITY, ARISING FROM OR RELATED TO YOUR USE OF THE SERVICE.
legal.terms.sections.liability.p2: OUR TOTAL AGGREGATE LIABILITY FOR ANY CLAIM ARISING OUT OF OR RELATING TO THE SERVICE SHALL NOT EXCEED THE GREATER OF (A) THE AMOUNT YOU PAID US FOR THE SERVICE IN THE TWELVE (12) MONTHS PRECEDING THE CLAIM, OR (B) USD $100. BECAUSE THE SERVICE IS FREE, CLAUSE (A) WILL TYPICALLY BE ZERO.
legal.terms.sections.indemnification.p1: You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless Inievo Technologies and its affiliates from any claims, damages, losses, liabilities, and expenses (including reasonable legal fees) arising from your use of the Service, Your Content, or your violation of these Terms or applicable law.
legal.terms.sections.intellectualPropert: The Pdfing Pro name, logos, website design, user interface, and original software are owned by Inievo Technologies and protected by applicable intellectual property laws. You may not copy, modify, distribute, or create derivative works from our branding or code except as permitted by law.
Third-party open-source and commercial libraries integrated into the Service remain subject to their respective license terms.
legal.terms.sections.modifications.title: 12. Changes to the service and terms
legal.terms.sections.modifications.p1: We may modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of the Service at any time, with or without notice, including adding or removing tools, changing processing methods, or imposing usage limits.
legal.terms.sections.modifications.p2: We may update these Terms from time to time. The "Last updated" date above indicates the latest revision. Your continued use of the Service after changes become effective constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.
legal.terms.sections.termination.title: 13. Suspension and termination
legal.terms.sections.termination.p1: We may restrict, suspend, or block access to the Service immediately, without prior notice, if we reasonably believe you have violated these Terms, abused server-assisted features, or posed a security or legal risk.
legal.terms.sections.termination.p2: You may stop using the Service at any time. Provisions that by their nature should survive termination — including disclaimers, limitations of liability, indemnification, and governing law — will remain in effect.
legal.terms.sections.governingLaw.title: 14. Governing law and disputes
legal.terms.sections.governingLaw.p1: These Terms are governed by the laws of the People's Republic of Bangladesh, without regard to conflict-of-law principles.
legal.terms.sections.governingLaw.p2: Any dispute arising from or relating to these Terms or the Service shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Bangladesh, unless mandatory consumer protection laws in your country require otherwise.
legal.terms.sections.contact.title: 15. Contact
legal.terms.sections.contact.p1: For questions about these Terms, please visit our Contact page or email contact@inievo.com. Inievo Technologies operates Pdfing Pro from Bangladesh.
legal.contact.title: Contact Us
legal.contact.subtitle: Questions, feedback, bug reports, or privacy inquiries — we'd love to hear from you.
legal.contact.channels.email.title: General inquiries
legal.contact.channels.email.body: For support, partnerships, privacy questions, or any other inquiries about Pdfing Pro.
legal.contact.channels.website.title: Inievo Technologies
legal.contact.channels.website.body: Learn more about the team behind Pdfing Pro and our other products.
legal.contact.channels.bugs.title: Bug reports & feature requests
legal.contact.channels.bugs.body: Found a bug or have an idea? Email us with steps to reproduce and your browser version.
legal.contact.response.title: Response times
legal.contact.response.p1: We read every message. Typical response times:
legal.contact.response.l3: Privacy or legal requests: within 30 days
legal.contact.faq.title: Frequently asked questions
legal.contact.faq.privacy.question: Do you store my PDF files?
legal.contact.faq.privacy.answer: No. For most tools, your files are processed entirely in your browser and never uploaded to our servers.
legal.contact.faq.terms.question: Is Pdfing Pro free to use?
legal.contact.faq.terms.answer: Yes. Pdfing Pro is completely free with no sign-up required, no file-size caps, and no watermarks added by us.
legal.contact.faq.data.question: What data do you collect?
legal.contact.faq.data.answer: Very little. We store your language preference locally and may log basic server data for reliability. We do not collect document content.
home.hero.badge: 100% browser-based · Most tools run locally in your browser
home.hero.subtitle: Merge, split, compress, convert, redact, sign, and more—powered entirely in your browser. Your files never leave your device. No uploads, no accounts.
home.filesStay.title: Your files stay on your device
home.filesStay.body: Pdfing Pro runs entirely inside your browser. That means your PDFs are processed on your computer/phone, not uploaded to a server.
home.step1.title: 1) Choose a file
home.step1.body: Pick a PDF from your device. It stays local.
home.step2.title: 2) Edit in your browser
home.step2.body: Merge, split, crop, sign, compress, and more. Processing happens locally.
home.step3.title: 3) Download the result
home.step3.body: Save the updated PDF. Nothing is sent anywhere.
home.noUploads.title: No uploads
home.noUploads.body: Your PDF never leaves your device.
home.noTracking.title: No tracking
home.noTracking.body: We don't look at your files or collect their content.
home.privateByDesign.title: Private by design
home.privateByDesign.body: Everything happens locally in your browser.
home.importantNote.title: Important note
home.importantNote.body: Since everything runs on your device, very large files and OCR can take longer depending on your phone/computer.
home.private.title: 100% Private
home.private.body: Files never leave your device. All processing happens in the browser.
home.noLimits.title: No Limits
home.noLimits.body: No file-size caps, no sign-up required, no watermarks added.
home.comingSoon.title: More capabilities on the way
home.comingSoon.subtitle: We are steadily expanding Pdfing Pro with batch workflows, cleaner exports, and the tools teams ask for most.
home.comingSoon.footer: Updates ship regularly. Bookmark this page to follow new releases.
tools.mergePdf.title: Merge PDF
tools.mergePdf.description: Combine multiple PDFs into one file.

tools.splitPdf.description: Divide a PDF into separate files by page range.
tools.organizePdf.title: Reorder / Delete Pages
tools.organizePdf.description: Drag pages to reorder or click × to delete them.
tools.addPageNumbers.title: Add Page Numbers
tools.addPageNumbers.description: Stamp page numbers on every page of your PDF.
tools.pdfToJpg.title: PDF to JPG
tools.pdfToJpg.description: Export each page as a high-quality JPEG image.
tools.jpgToPdf.title: JPG to PDF
tools.jpgToPdf.description: Pack one or more images into a single PDF.
tools.pdfToWord.title: PDF to Word
tools.pdfToWord.description: Extract text from a PDF and save as a .docx file.
tools.compressPdf.title: Compress PDF
tools.compressPdf.description: Reduce file size while keeping acceptable quality.
tools.rotatePdf.title: Rotate PDF
tools.rotatePdf.description: Rotate pages 90°, 180° or 270° in any PDF.
tools.watermarkPdf.title: Watermark PDF
tools.watermarkPdf.description: Stamp custom text across all pages.
tools.signPdf.title: Sign PDF
tools.signPdf.description: Draw or type your signature and embed it.
tools.highlightPdf.title: Draw / Highlight PDF
tools.highlightPdf.description: Draw freehand strokes or highlight any area on your PDF.
tools.stampPdf.title: Stamp PDF
tools.stampPdf.description: Upload an image stamp and place it on any page.
tools.cropPdf.title: Crop PDF
tools.cropPdf.description: Crop pages individually with a smooth touch-friendly crop box.
tools.addPaddingPdf.title: Add Page Padding
tools.addPaddingPdf.description: Add customizable white padding around each page with inch inputs and drag controls.
tools.ocrPdf.title: OCR PDF
tools.ocrPdf.description: Extract text from scanned PDFs using OCR.
tools.protectPdf.title: Protect PDF
tools.protectPdf.description: Lock your PDF with a password.
tools.unlockPdf.title: Unlock PDF
tools.unlockPdf.description: Remove password protection from a PDF.
tools.websiteToPdf.title: Website / HTML to PDF
tools.websiteToPdf.description: Convert webpages or local HTML into a PDF using the browser's print engine.
tools.redactPdf.title: Redact PDF
tools.redactPdf.description: Black out sensitive areas manually or by searching for text.
tools.comparePdf.title: Compare PDF
tools.comparePdf.description: View two PDFs side by side, page by page.
tools.editMetadataPdf.title: Edit PDF Metadata
tools.editMetadataPdf.description: View and edit title, author, subject, and keywords.
tools.repairPdf.title: Repair PDF
tools.repairPdf.description: Attempt to fix corrupted or unreadable PDF files.
tools.fillPdfForms.title: Fill PDF Forms
tools.fillPdfForms.description: Fill AcroForm fields and download the completed PDF.
tools.verifySignaturePdf.title: Verify PDF Signature
tools.verifySignaturePdf.description: Detect signature fields and show basic signing info.
tools.pdfToPdfa.title: PDF to PDF/A
tools.pdfToPdfa.description: Normalize PDF for archival (best-effort browser conversion).
tools.pdfToExcel.title: PDF to Excel
tools.pdfToExcel.description: Extract text from PDF pages into a CSV spreadsheet.
tools.extractImagesPdf.title: Extract Images from PDF
tools.extractImagesPdf.description: Pull embedded images out of your PDF pages.
tools.pdfWorkflow.title: PDF Workflow
tools.pdfWorkflow.description: Chain merge and compress steps in one pipeline.
tools.extractTextPdf.title: Extract Text from PDF
tools.extractTextPdf.description: Copy all text from your PDF into a .txt file.
tools.pdfToPng.title: PDF to PNG
tools.pdfToPng.description: Export each page as a lossless PNG image.
tools.pngToPdf.title: PNG to PDF
tools.pngToPdf.description: Combine PNG or WebP images into one PDF.
tools.reversePdf.title: Reverse PDF Pages
tools.reversePdf.description: Flip the page order from last to first.
tools.grayscalePdf.title: Grayscale PDF
tools.grayscalePdf.description: Convert every page to black and white.
tools.invertPdf.title: Invert PDF Colors
tools.invertPdf.description: Invert page colors for dark-mode friendly reading.
tools.pdfInfo.title: PDF Info
tools.pdfInfo.description: Inspect page count, file size, and document properties.
tools.flattenPdf.title: Flatten PDF
tools.flattenPdf.description: Burn forms and annotations into a non-editable PDF.
tools.removeBlankPages.title: Remove Blank Pages
tools.removeBlankPages.description: Detect and delete empty pages from your PDF.
tools.duplicatePages.title: Duplicate PDF Pages
tools.duplicatePages.description: Copy selected pages and insert them after the original.
tools.extractPages.title: Extract PDF Pages
tools.extractPages.description: Save selected pages as a new PDF document.
tools.removeAnnotations.title: Remove PDF Annotations
tools.removeAnnotations.description: Strip comments, highlights, and markup from your PDF.
tools.addImagePdf.title: Add Image to PDF
tools.addImagePdf.description: Place a PNG or JPG image on any page of your PDF.
tools.resizePdf.title: Resize PDF Pages
tools.resizePdf.description: Scale pages to A4, Letter, or Legal paper size.
tools.nUpPdf.title: N-Up PDF
tools.nUpPdf.description: Print multiple pages per sheet in a 2, 4, or 9-up grid.
tools.bookletPdf.title: Booklet PDF
tools.bookletPdf.description: Arrange pages for saddle-stitch booklet printing.
tools.sanitizePdf.title: Sanitize PDF
tools.sanitizePdf.description: Remove metadata, scripts, and hidden embedded content.
tools.compressImagesPdf.title: Compress PDF Images
tools.compressImagesPdf.description: Recompress embedded images to reduce file size.
tools.bookmarksPdf.title: Bookmarks & TOC
tools.bookmarksPdf.description: Add PDF bookmarks, a clickable table of contents, and navigation outline.
tools.splitByBookmarks.title: Split PDF by Bookmarks
tools.splitByBookmarks.description: Divide a PDF into separate files at each bookmark section.
tools.headerFooterPdf.title: Add Header & Footer
tools.headerFooterPdf.description: Stamp custom header and footer text on every page.
tools.pdfToPowerpoint.title: PDF to PowerPoint
tools.pdfToPowerpoint.description: Turn each PDF page into an editable PowerPoint slide.
tools.webpToPdf.title: WebP to PDF
tools.webpToPdf.description: Convert WebP images into a single PDF document.
tools.splitBySize.title: Split PDF by Size
tools.splitBySize.description: Divide a PDF into parts that stay under a file-size limit.
tools.mergeAlternate.title: Merge Alternate Pages
tools.mergeAlternate.description: Interleave pages from two PDFs: A1, B1, A2, B2…
tools.addLinksPdf.title: Add Links to PDF
tools.addLinksPdf.description: Insert clickable URL links onto PDF pages.
tools.textToPdf.title: Text to PDF
tools.textToPdf.description: Turn plain text or notes into a formatted PDF document.
tools.autoRotatePdf.title: Auto-Rotate PDF
tools.autoRotatePdf.description: Automatically rotate pages to portrait or landscape orientation.
tools.extractAttachmentsPdf.title: Extract PDF Attachments
tools.extractAttachmentsPdf.description: Pull embedded files out of a PDF into a ZIP archive.
tools.tiffToPdf.title: TIFF to PDF
tools.tiffToPdf.description: Convert TIFF scans (including multi-page) into a PDF document.
tools.visualDiffPdf.title: Visual PDF Diff
tools.visualDiffPdf.description: Highlight pixel-level differences between two PDF versions.
tools.batchWorkflow.title: Batch PDF Workflow
tools.batchWorkflow.description: Chain merge, compress, flatten, grayscale, and rotate in one run.
tools.addAttachmentsPdf.title: Add Attachments to PDF
tools.addAttachmentsPdf.description: Embed files inside a PDF as downloadable attachments.
tools.heicToPdf.title: HEIC to PDF
tools.heicToPdf.description: Convert iPhone HEIC photos into a PDF document.
tools.batesNumberingPdf.title: Bates Numbering
tools.batesNumberingPdf.description: Stamp sequential Bates numbers on every page for legal discovery.
tools.pdfToHtml.title: PDF to HTML
tools.pdfToHtml.description: Export PDF text into a clean, readable HTML file.
tools.splitByText.title: Split PDF by Text
tools.splitByText.description: Divide a PDF when a page contains specific text (e.g. Chapter).
extractText.pageDescription: Extract selectable text from your PDF and download it as a plain .txt file.
pdfToPng.pageDescription: Convert each PDF page to a high-quality PNG image, packaged in a ZIP file.
pdfToPng.done: Download started. You can convert another file.
pngToPdf.pageDescription: Drop PNG or WebP images to build a single PDF in page order.
pngToPdf.dropHere: Drop PNG or WebP images here
pngToPdf.error: Could not create PDF from images.
reversePdf.pageDescription: Instantly reverse the page order of any PDF.
reversePdf.hint: The last page becomes first, and so on. Original content is preserved.
grayscalePdf.pageDescription: Convert color pages to grayscale while keeping layout intact.
invertPdf.pageDescription: Invert colors on every page — useful for scanned documents and night reading.
pdfInfo.pageDescription: View file size, page count, encryption status, and document metadata.
flattenPdf.pageDescription: Flatten interactive forms and burn page content into a static, non-editable PDF.
flattenPdf.hint: Form fields, comments, and editable layers are merged into the page image.
removeBlankPages.pageDescription: Automatically detect and remove pages with no text or visible content.
removeBlankPages.hint: Pages with only whitespace or a tiny amount of ink are removed.
duplicatePages.pageDescription: Select pages to duplicate — each copy is inserted right after the original.
duplicatePages.hint: Tap thumbnails to choose which pages to duplicate.
extractPages.pageDescription: Pick the pages you want and download them as a separate PDF.
removeAnnotations.pageDescription: Remove comments, highlights, stamps, and other markup from your PDF.
removeAnnotations.hint: Annotations are burned out by re-rendering each page as a flat image.
addImagePdf.pageDescription: Add a PNG, JPG, or WebP image to any page of your PDF.
addImagePdf.error: Could not add image to PDF.
resizePdf.pageDescription: Resize every page to a standard paper size while preserving content.
nUpPdf.pageDescription: Combine pages onto fewer sheets — choose 2, 4, or 9 pages per page.
bookletPdf.pageDescription: Reorder pages for duplex printing and saddle-stitch folding into a booklet.
bookletPdf.hint: Page count is padded to a multiple of four with blank pages if needed.
sanitizePdf.pageDescription: Strip document metadata and rebuild the PDF to remove scripts and attachments.
sanitizePdf.hint: Title, author, and other metadata are cleared. Pages are copied into a clean file.
compressImagesPdf.pageDescription: Recompress embedded images only — text and vectors stay sharp.
compressImagesPdf.hint: Pages with photos or scanned images are re-encoded as JPEG. Text-only pages are kept as vectors.
batch.modeHint: Process multiple files and download results as a ZIP.
metadata.pageDescription: View and edit document properties like title, author, subject, and keywords.
metadata.title: Title
metadata.author: Author
metadata.subject: Subject
metadata.creator: Creator
repair.pageDescription: Try to fix corrupted PDFs by reloading and re-saving the document structure.
repair.note: This repairs some structural issues but cannot recover severely damaged files or missing content.
redact.pageDescription: Draw redaction boxes on pages or search for text to black out sensitive content.
redact.noBoxes: Add boxes or search for text first.
redact.hintDraw: Drag on the page to draw a black redaction box.
redact.hintDrawTouch: Drag on the page to mark sensitive areas for redaction.
compare.pageDescription: Upload two PDFs to compare them page by page side by side.
pdfToExcel.pageDescription: Extract text from each page into a CSV file that opens in Excel.
pdfToExcel.note: Text is extracted in reading order. Complex tables may need manual cleanup in Excel.
extractImages.pageDescription: Extract embedded images from your PDF and download them as a ZIP.
extractImages.none: No embedded images found in this PDF.
fillForms.pageDescription: Fill interactive PDF form fields and download the completed document.
fillForms.noFields: No fillable form fields detected in this PDF.
verifySignature.pageDescription: Detect digital signature fields in a PDF. Full cryptographic validation is not available in the browser.
verifySignature.disclaimer: Browser verification is limited to field detection only.
pdfToPdfa.pageDescription: Normalize your PDF for archival use. True ISO PDF/A compliance requires specialized server tools.
pdfToPdfa.warning: This is a best-effort browser normalization, not certified PDF/A conversion.
workflow.pageDescription: Run a simple pipeline: merge multiple PDFs, then compress the result.
merge.pageDescription: Combine multiple PDF files into one. Drag to reorder before merging.
merge.clickToSelect: or click to select multiple files
merge.batchHint: Batch mode merges files in pairs (1+2, 3+4, …) into separate PDFs inside a ZIP.
merge.error: Merge failed. Ensure all files are valid, non-encrypted PDFs.
split.pageDescription: Divide a PDF into multiple files by page range or extract individual pages.
split.eachSelectedSaved: Each selected page will be saved as a separate PDF.
compress.pageDescription: Reduce file size by re-encoding pages at lower image quality.
compress.note: Compression rasterizes pages to JPEG. Text will no longer be selectable. Best suited for print-ready or image-heavy PDFs.
rotate.pageDescription: Rotate all pages or specific pages by 90°, 180° or 270°.
watermark.pageDescription: Stamp custom text across all pages of your PDF.
protect.pageDescription: Lock your PDF with a password. Uses 128-bit AES for broad support in Chrome, Edge, and Adobe Reader.
unlock.pageDescription: Remove password protection from a PDF you own.
unlock.hint: Leave blank if the PDF has no user password but is owner-restricted.
unlock.error: Failed to unlock PDF. Ensure it is password-protected and you have the correct password.
pageNumbers.pageDescription: Stamp page numbers on every page of your PDF.
pageNumbers.formatHint: Use {n} for page number, {total} for total pages
bookmarksPdf.pageDescription: Create bookmarks and a clickable table of contents from a simple list of titles and page numbers.
bookmarksPdf.entriesHint: One entry per line: Title|Page (example: Chapter 1|3).
bookmarksPdf.addTocPage: Insert a table of contents page at the start
bookmarksPdf.addOutline: Add PDF outline bookmarks in the navigation panel
bookmarksPdf.foundExisting: Loaded {count} existing bookmark(s) from your PDF.
bookmarksPdf.invalidLines: Check your bookmark lines. Use Title|Page with valid page numbers.
splitByBookmarks.pageDescription: Split a PDF into separate files using its built-in bookmark sections.
splitByBookmarks.noBookmarks: No bookmarks were found in this PDF.
splitByBookmarks.done: Your bookmark sections were downloaded as a ZIP archive.
headerFooterPdf.pageDescription: Add custom header and footer text to every page of your PDF.
headerFooterPdf.includePageNumbers: Include page numbers in the footer
pdfToPowerpoint.pageDescription: Convert each PDF page into a PowerPoint slide.
pdfToPowerpoint.limitationsBody: Each slide is built from a high-quality page image, so text will not be editable inside PowerPoint.
webpToPdf.pageDescription: Combine WebP images into one PDF file.
webpToPdf.error: Could not convert WebP images to PDF.
splitBySize.pageDescription: Split a PDF into multiple files so each part stays below your chosen size limit.
splitBySize.hint: Useful for email attachments and upload limits. Oversized single pages are kept in their own file.
splitBySize.invalidSize: Enter a valid size greater than zero.
splitBySize.done: Your size-limited PDF parts were downloaded as a ZIP archive.
mergeAlternate.pageDescription: Combine two PDFs by alternating pages from each file.
mergeAlternate.dropHint: First file = A, second file = B
mergeAlternate.orderHint: Output order: A page 1, B page 1, A page 2, B page 2, and so on.
addLinksPdf.pageDescription: Add clickable URL links to selected PDF pages.
addLinksPdf.invalidLines: Check your link lines. Use Page|URL|Label with valid page numbers and http(s) URLs.
textToPdf.pageDescription: Create a clean PDF document from plain text.
textToPdf.textPlaceholder: Paste or type your text here…
textToPdf.error: Could not create PDF from text.
autoRotatePdf.pageDescription: Automatically rotate pages to a consistent orientation.
autoRotatePdf.hint: Landscape pages rotate 90° to portrait, or portrait pages rotate to landscape.
extractAttachments.pageDescription: Extract embedded file attachments from a PDF and download them as a ZIP archive.
extractAttachments.none: No embedded attachments were found in this PDF.
extractAttachments.found: {count} attachment(s) downloaded in a ZIP file.
tiffToPdf.pageDescription: Convert TIFF images or scans into a single PDF. Multi-page TIFF files become multiple PDF pages.
tiffToPdf.error: Could not convert TIFF to PDF.
visualDiff.pageDescription: Compare two PDFs visually and highlight changed pixels in red.
visualDiff.legend: Red areas mark pixels that differ between the two documents.
batchWorkflow.pageDescription: Run multiple PDF operations in one pipeline without re-uploading between steps.
addAttachments.pageDescription: Embed supporting files inside a PDF so readers can download them from the document.
addAttachments.dropHint: Any file type — documents, spreadsheets, images, etc.
heicToPdf.pageDescription: Convert HEIC or HEIF photos from iPhone and other devices into a PDF.
heicToPdf.error: Could not convert HEIC to PDF.
batesNumbering.pageDescription: Add Bates numbers to every page for legal document identification.
batesNumbering.invalid: Enter a valid start number and digit padding (1–12).
pdfToHtml.pageDescription: Export extractable PDF text into a styled HTML document.
splitByText.pageDescription: Split a PDF into sections when a page contains your search text.
splitByText.hint: A new section starts on each page that contains this text.
splitByText.empty: Enter search text to split by.
splitByText.done: {count} PDF part(s) downloaded as a ZIP archive.
pdfToJpg.pageDescription: Export each page as a high-resolution image.
jpgToPdf.pageDescription: Pack one or more images into a single PDF file.
jpgToPdf.formats: JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP - click to select
pdfToWord.pageDescription: Extract text from your PDF and save it as an editable .docx file.
pdfToWord.limitationsBody: Text and paragraph structure are extracted from the PDF's text layer. Complex layouts, tables, and images are not preserved. For scanned PDFs with no text layer, use the
ocr.pageDescription: Extract text from scanned PDFs using Tesseract.js - runs fully in your browser.
ocr.perfBody: OCR is computationally intensive and may take 15–60 seconds per page depending on your device. Tesseract language data (~5 MB) is downloaded on first use.
organize.pageDescription: Drag pages to reorder, or click × to delete them.
organize.pageCount_one: {count} page - drag to reorder, click × to remove
organize.pageCount_other: {count} pages - drag to reorder, click × to remove
organize.clickToRestore: Click a deleted page to restore it.
organize.atLeastOne: At least one page must remain.
organize.deletedCount_one: {count} page marked for removal. Click to restore.
organize.deletedCount_other: {count} pages marked for removal. Click to restore.
organize.hintTouch: Use ↑↓ to reorder · Tap × to remove · Tap a faded page to restore
organize.hintMouse: Drag thumbnails to reorder · Click × to remove
stamp.pageDescription: Upload an image stamp, place it on any page, then drag to move, resize corners, or rotate.
stamp.dropPdfSub: or click to select a PDF
stamp.dropStampSub: PNG, JPG, JPEG, GIF, or WebP
stamp.hintTouch: Tap to place · Drag to move · Pinch corners to resize
stamp.hintMouse: Click to place · Drag to move · Resize corners
stamp.hintUpload: Upload a stamp image to start placing
stamp.thumbHint: Click a thumbnail to jump to that page and keep stamping.
sign.pageDescription: Draw your signature and embed it on any page.
sign.hintWithSig: Tap to place · Drag to move · Drag corners to resize · Drag ↺ to rotate
sign.hintMouse: Click to place · Drag to move · Drag corners to resize · Drag ↺ to rotate
sign.hintNoSig: Draw your signature below, then tap here to place it
sign.drawPrompt: Draw signature below, then click to place it here
sign.signHint: Sign in the box above with your mouse or finger
sign.thumbHint: Click a thumbnail to jump to that page, then click the preview to place your signature.
highlight.pageDescription: Highlight areas or draw freehand strokes on any page, then export the edited PDF.
highlight.hintSelected: Annotation selected - tap elsewhere to deselect
highlight.hintDraw: Drag to sketch a smooth stroke · Tap a highlight to select & delete
highlight.hintHighlight: Click & drag to highlight · Tap a highlight to select & delete
highlight.hintHighlightTouch: Touch & drag to highlight · Tap a highlight to select & delete
highlight.thumbHint: Tap a thumbnail to jump to that page and add annotations there.
crop.pageDescription: Select a page, adjust the full-page crop box from any side, then export.
crop.hintTouch: Drag corners or edges to resize crop area
crop.hintMouse: Drag any side or corner to adjust
crop.fullPageBox: Current page uses the full-page box
crop.thumbHint: Tap a thumbnail first, then adjust that page's crop box above.
padding.pageDescription: Set padding in inches per side, drag the blue boundary, then export with expanded white margins.
padding.hintTouch: Drag edges or corners, or type inch values on each side
padding.hintMouse: Drag the blue boundary or type inch values on each side
padding.noPadding: No padding on the current page
padding.thumbHint: Tap a thumbnail to edit that page's padding separately.
padding.error: Failed to add padding to PDF.
webToPdf.pageDescription: Convert public webpages or local HTML into a PDF. Website URLs use the same headless-browser rendering approach as major online PDF tools.
webToPdf.urlHint: Enter a public website URL and click Download PDF. Preview may be blank on some sites, but conversion can still work.
webToPdf.dropHtmlSub: or tap to choose a local .html file
webToPdf.fitOriginalDesc: Keep the page close to its own layout.
webToPdf.fitWidthDesc: Constrain wide content to the printable page.
webToPdf.fitCompactDesc: Use tighter spacing for long pages and tables.
webToPdf.previewHintUrl: Preview is optional. Download PDF uses a headless browser, so embed-blocked sites can still convert.
webToPdf.previewHintHtml: Your print settings (page size, margins, scale) are applied to this preview.
webToPdf.enterUrlPreview: Enter a website URL above to load an optional preview here.
webToPdf.popupBlocked: Popup blocked. Allow popups for this site, then try Print / Save PDF again.
webToPdf.printOpened: Print dialog opened. Choose Save as PDF (or Microsoft Print to PDF) as the destination.
webToPdf.downloadReady: PDF generated successfully. Click Download to save it.
webToPdf.convertError: Could not convert this website to PDF.
webToPdf.convertUnsupported: This page needs a login, subscription, or manual browser access. No online PDF tool can reliably convert it automatically.
webToPdf.embedBlockedBody: This site blocked the embedded preview, but Download PDF can still render it with a headless browser — the same method used by online PDF converters.
